name: Coconut Beer Shrimp with Sweet and Tangy Sauc
recipeIngredient: 48 Shrimp; medium, peeled but with tails on and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the Sweet and Tangy Dipping Sauce in a bowl. Refrigerate.
2. In a small bowl, combine all seasoning mix ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together 2 tablespoons of the seasoning mix with eggs, 1 1/4 cups flour, beer, and baking powder. Break up any lumps.
4. In another small bowl, mix remaining flour with 1 1/2 teaspoons of the seasoning mix.
5. Place coconut in a separate bowl.
6. Sprinkle both sides of the shrimp with the remaining seasoning mix.
7. Dredge each shrimp (by tail) first in the flour mixture, shaking off excess, then dip in batter (excluding tail), allowing excess to drip off, and coat generously with grated coconut.
8. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 350°F (175°C).
9. Drop shrimp one at a time into hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 30 seconds to 1 minute per side.
10. Do not crowd the pan.
11. Drain on paper towels.
12. Serve immediately with Sweet and Tangy Dipping Sauce.
